title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 6.  BLANK

CHAPTER 7.  DOCUMENTS OF TITLE

PART 1.  GENERAL

§7-101.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as Uniform Commercial Code -- Documents of Title.

Added by Acts 1978, No. 164, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1979; Acts 2006, No. 533, §6; Acts 2009, No. 207, §3, eff. Jan. 1, 2010.
